---
qmd-prover:
  imports:
    - from: foundations.qmd
      use:
        - def-reflexive
---

::: {#thm-main-first .theorem .goal name="First demo theorem" date="2026-07-13"}
The number one is equal to itself.
:::

::: {.proof of="thm-main-first"}
Apply @def-reflexive.
:::

::: {#thm-main-second .theorem .goal name="Second demo theorem" date="2026-07-13"}
The number two is equal to itself.
:::
